# Laraskills

Laraskills is a Laravel AI engineering knowledge system. It gives AI coding agents Laravel-specific skills, rules, retrieval workflows, and MCP support for deeper context and fewer guesses.

## Docs

- [Documentation](/docs): Overview of the Laraskills documentation.
- [Getting Started](/docs/getting-started): Install and verify Laraskills in under a minute.
- [Installation](/docs/installation): Install via npm, build from source, update, and diagnose.
- [CLI Reference](/docs/cli): All Laraskills CLI commands: install, retrieve, search, get, validate, doctor.
- [MCP Support](/docs/mcp): Read-only MCP tools for deterministic local knowledge retrieval.
- [OpenCode Setup](/docs/opencode-setup): Configure OpenCode to use Laraskills skills and MCP tools.
- [Integrations](/docs/integrations): Supported AI coding agents, IDEs, and editors.
- [Skills](/docs/skills): Skill workflows for Core Engineering, Testing, Security, Data, API, and DevOps.

## Reference

- [Glossary](/glossary): Key terms and concepts in the Laraskills knowledge system.
- [Research](/research): Attribution study measuring Laraskills impact on coding agent performance.
